title: create_synthesis_note
description: Compose a new note that synthesizes an answer over multiple existing notes and write it to the vault. Used at the end of a query turn when the user asks for the answer to be saved (e.g. 'save this as a note'). The app runs the synthesis-writer prompt internally to produce the body; the orchestrator only supplies the question and the source paths. Always passes through the preview gate. Always writes with cowork.source = 'synthesis'.

query.description: The user's original question, verbatim. Becomes the basis of the synthesis note's title and the framing of the synthesized body.

items.description: Vault-relative path to a note that should be cited in the synthesis. Must not contain '..' segments.

sources.description: The set of source notes the synthesis is grounded in. Pass the paths from the reranked retrieval payload that were actually used in the answer — every cited path in the synthesis body must appear here.

target_path.description: Vault-relative path where the synthesis note should be written. Pass null to let the app choose a path under the synthesis folder. Must not contain '..' segments. Must not collide with an existing note unless the user explicitly asked to overwrite (which v1 does not support — use a different path).
